title: cytisus subspinescens
intro: Cytisus subspinescens, also known as the spiny broom, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cytisus subspinescens are said to include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
